CREATE TABLE test_smallint_table (id SMALLINT PRIMARY KEY, value SMALLINT);
SELECT id, value FROM test_smallint_table WHERE value BETWEEN -32768 AND 32767;
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM test_smallint_table WHERE value > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_positive FROM test_smallint_table WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_smallint_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_smallint_table WHERE value < 0);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id SMALLINT, smallint_id SMALLINT, FOREIGN KEY (smallint_id) REFERENCES test_smallint_table(id));
SELECT a.id, t.value FROM another_table a JOIN test_smallint_table t ON a.smallint_id = t.id WHERE t.value > 0;
SELECT t.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE smallint_id = t.id) AS reference_count FROM test_smallint_table t;
UPDATE test_smallint_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value * 2 AS doubled_value FROM test_smallint_table WHERE value < 100;
